title: pourouma mollis subsp. mollis
intro: Pourouma mollis subsp. mollis, also known as the Pourouma mollis, is a species of plant in the family Houpiaeae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The Pourouma mollis plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Pourouma mollis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its bark, leaves, and roots are used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
